channel.title: Zeitschrift für Naturforschung C
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Zeitschrift für Naturforschung C

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Muhammad Naveed, Khushbakht Javed, Tariq Aziz, Ali Zafar, Mahnoor Fatima, Imran Ali, Ayaz Ali Khan, Thamer H. Albekairi DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/znc-2025-frontmatter3-4

item.title: Advancing psoriasis drug delivery through topical liposomes

item.title: Hepatoprotective activity of medicinal plants, their phytochemistry, and safety concerns: a systematic review
item.description: Article by Muhammad Naveed, Khushbakht Javed, Tariq Aziz, Ali Zafar, Mahnoor Fatima, Imran Ali, Ayaz Ali Khan, Thamer H. Albekairi DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/znc-2024-0116

item.title: Phytochemical profile and antioxidant capacity of the endemic species Bellevalia sasonii Fidan
item.description: Article by Muhammad Naveed, Khushbakht Javed, Tariq Aziz, Ali Zafar, Mahnoor Fatima, Imran Ali, Ayaz Ali Khan, Thamer H. Albekairi DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/znc-2024-0115

item.title: In silico molecular modeling and in vitro biological screening of novel benzimidazole-based piperazine derivatives as potential acetylcholinesterase and butyrylcholinesterase inhibitors
item.description: Article by Muhammad Naveed, Khushbakht Javed, Tariq Aziz, Ali Zafar, Mahnoor Fatima, Imran Ali, Ayaz Ali Khan, Thamer H. Albekairi DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/znc-2024-0068

item.title: Coenzyme Q10 supplementation affects cellular ionic balance: relevance to aging
item.description: Article by Muhammad Naveed, Khushbakht Javed, Tariq Aziz, Ali Zafar, Mahnoor Fatima, Imran Ali, Ayaz Ali Khan, Thamer H. Albekairi DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/znc-2024-0129

item.title: Revolutionizing the probiotic functionality, biochemical activity, antibiotic resistance and specialty genes of Pediococcus acidilactici BCB1H via in-vitro and in-silico approaches
item.description: Article by Muhammad Naveed, Khushbakht Javed, Tariq Aziz, Ali Zafar, Mahnoor Fatima, Imran Ali, Ayaz Ali Khan, Thamer H. Albekairi DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/znc-2024-0074

item.title: Synthesis of modified Schiff base appended 1,2,4-triazole hybrids scaffolds: elucidating the in vitro and in silico α-amylase and α-glucosidase inhibitors potential
item.description: Article by Muhammad Naveed, Khushbakht Javed, Tariq Aziz, Ali Zafar, Mahnoor Fatima, Imran Ali, Ayaz Ali Khan, Thamer H. Albekairi DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/znc-2024-0073

item.title: Redefining a new frontier in alkaptonuria therapy with AI-driven drug candidate design via in-silico innovation
item.description: Article by Muhammad Naveed, Khushbakht Javed, Tariq Aziz, Ali Zafar, Mahnoor Fatima, Imran Ali, Ayaz Ali Khan, Thamer H. Albekairi DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/znc-2024-0075
